text:
All Contract and Plan ID that were active in 2014 appear in this data file. To determine whether the 
Contract and Plan IDs in the data file for the reference year (year of the data file) represent the same 
plan in the prior year, compare this variable (along with the corresponding CONTRACT_ID_14) to the 
PLAN_ID_13 (and CONTRACT_ID_13). 

Prior to 2015, this variable was always encrypted to comply with CMS privacy rules. 

You need to know both the Part D contract number (variable called
